title: brachystelma nepalense
intro: Brachystelma nepalense is a rare and unique species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Nepal brachystelma. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Brachystelma nepalense include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into a decoction or infusion by boiling its roots and leaves in water, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
